summary: First iteration of ValueWeave Idea Library MVP. Backend (20/20 pytest) and frontend (all critical flows) pass. Public /ideas + /ideas/:slug accessible anonymously, navbar/landing/mobile-bottom-nav integration confirmed, auth gating works via seeded Mongo session, /business-ideas redirects to /ideas, dashboard quick-access card present, anonymous save shows sign-in toast (no 500), 29 seed ideas verified.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Root cause is the visual-editor instrumentation injecting <span data-ve-dynamic=...> inside native <option> elements (FilterGroup -> <select><option>{label}</option></select> in Ideas.jsx line ~142). Functionally harmless but noisy in console. Consider rendering option text as a plain string literal/expression without anything that the visual-editor wraps (e.g., concatenate into a const variable outside JSX, or render via dangerouslySetInnerHTML, or use a non-native dropdown like shadcn Select).

action_items: (Low priority) Silence the <span> inside <option> hydration warning in Ideas.jsx FilterGroup options (caused by visual-editor wrapping option label expressions).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: route ordering correctly places /ideas/saved and /ideas/filters BEFORE /ideas/{slug} — no shadowing issues.
All Mongo queries use {'_id': 0} projection — safe for JSON serialization.
Auth helper supports both cookie and Bearer; expires_at normalized to tz-aware. Good.
Save endpoint validates slug existence before insert — good.
Idea Pydantic model uses extra='ignore' so seed data with extra fields won't break — good.
CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' would normally be rejected by browsers; here CORS_ORIGINS env can be set to specific origins in prod. Acceptable for MVP.

Frontend Ideas.jsx uses native <select>/<option>; the visual-editor injects <span> inside <option> causing React hydration warnings. Consider switching to shadcn Select to remove warnings and improve mobile UX.
AuthContext correctly skips /auth/me when location.hash contains session_id (race-condition prevention noted in App.js).
test_credentials: Emergent Google Auth — automated tests seed user_sessions in MongoDB (test_database) and use Bearer token. See /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Test users + sessions seeded ephemerally in test_database.users and test_database.user_sessions; cleaned up in fixture teardown. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, ideas list+filters+facets, idea detail+related+404, auth gating, auth flow with seeded Bearer, save toggle, saved list, logout. To rerun: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Requires mongosh available locally. For frontend, mobile bottom nav visible only on <md viewport (390px tested); /business-ideas -> /ideas redirect works; /business-ideas/:slug -> /ideas/:slug also wired. Login session cookie injection works against domain library-visibility.preview.emergentagent.com with httpOnly=false (server sets httpOnly=true in prod cookie, but Bearer header is the primary path for automated tests).
